title: Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales: Everything You Need to Get Started — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Selling a digital product should be simple. You create something valuable — an ebook, a course, a Notion template, a font, a preset pack, a beat — and someone pays you for access to it. The file transfers. The transaction completes. But for millions of creators, the payment layer is where everything breaks down. PayPal is unavailable. Stripe requires a local bank account that links to an unsupported country. Gumroad holds payouts. The workarounds stop working. What actually works is a crypto-native stack: a static store on GitHub Pages, payment processing through NOWPayments, and automated delivery that sends the download link the moment a transaction confirms on-chain. No middleman. No platform risk. No geography filter.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

PayPal, Stripe, and other major payment processors often have geographical restrictions in place to comply with local laws and regulations. This means that creators from certain countries may not be able to use these services. By accepting Bitcoin, you can bypass these restrictions and sell your ebooks and digital products to anyone in the world, without the need for a traditional payment processor.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need to set up a few essential tools. First, you'll need a digital product store like Core Shop Engine, which allows you to host and sell your ebooks and digital products without the need for a traditional payment processor. You'll also need to integrate a frontend wallet like Web3 Wallet Connect, which enables buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, SOL, and over 300 other coins.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Once you have your digital product store and frontend wallet set up, you'll need to configure your payment and delivery pipeline. This will involve setting up automated delivery of your ebooks and digital products, as well as configuring your payment processor to accept Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. You can do this using the Admin Dashboard, which provides a user-friendly interface for managing your transactions and orders.
You can sell ebooks and digital products without using PayPal or other traditional payment processors.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, you're ready to go live and start selling your ebooks and digital products. Simply upload your digital products to your store, set a price, and start promoting your store to potential buyers. When a buyer makes a purchase, the frontend wallet will handle the payment processing, and your Core Shop Engine will automatically deliver the digital product to the buyer's email address.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Scaling a crypto-native digital store does not require changing infrastructure at any particular revenue level. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification and delivery through the same webhook pipeline whether you are processing five orders a month or five hundred. GitHub Pages scales to any traffic level automatically. NOWPayments handles volume without per-transaction approval delays. The only constraint as you scale is marketing — the technical infrastructure is the same on day one as it is at significant revenue. This is a meaningful advantage over platform-based alternatives where payout policies, fee structures, and compliance requirements often change as your volume increases.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Yes, you can sell ebooks and digital products without using PayPal or other traditional payment processors. By accepting Bitcoin and setting up a digital product store like Core Shop Engine, you can bypass geographical restrictions and sell your products to anyone in the world. The key is to integrate a frontend wallet like Web3 Wallet Connect to enable buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, and to configure your payment and delivery pipeline to handle automated delivery and payment processing.
Cryptocurrency payment processing eliminates geographical restrictions and KYC requirements, giving you access to a global market.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to sell ebooks and digital products without fees, or if you're interested in exploring alternative payment options beyond PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad, you're in the right place. Our digital product store, Core Shop Engine, and frontend wallet, Web3 Wallet Connect, are designed to help you break free from geographical restrictions and sell your products to anyone in the world. You can try out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html, and learn more about our products and services on our website.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling ebooks and digital products using Bitcoin, follow these steps: Set up a digital product store like Core Shop Engine, and integrate a frontend wallet like Web3 Wallet Connect. Configure your payment and delivery pipeline using the Admin Dashboard. Upload your digital products to your store, set a price, and start promoting your store. Test your payment flow and delivery pipeline to ensure a smooth experience for your buyers. Optimize your store's user experience and payment flow as needed to handle increased traffic and transactions.
Automated delivery and payment processing ensure a seamless experience for your buyers, from purchase to delivery.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
